description: A conceptual aerodynamicist is designing a Standard Class 15-meter sailplane. To achieve an optimal elliptical lift distribution, the wing planform has been divided into 4 distinct sections from root to tip. Read the specification document located at /home/ga/Desktop/sailplane_planform.txt to obtain the piecewise geometry. In OpenVSP, add a Wing component and use the 'Split' or 'Insert' functions in the Plan tab to divide the wing into exactly 4 sections. Navigate through the section indexer (e.g., [ 1 ] of 4) and input the specific Span, Root Chord, Tip Chord, and Sweep values defined in the specification for each section. Ensure the overall Total Span equals exactly 15.0 meters. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sailplane_15m.vsp3.
